name: crictrade
description: CricTrade - PSL cricket team token trading platform

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.contracts:deploy: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../contracts && npm install
